setup-types: if [ -d "moddable" ]; then echo 'Moddable SDK already exists at ./moddable'; exit 0; fi
cd moddable && git sparse-checkout set xs/includes typings examples
echo 'Moddable types fetched. Run `devbox run setup-editor` to create tsconfig.json for local editor support.'
setup-editor: if [ ! -f ".local-tsconfig.json" ]; then echo '.local-tsconfig.json not found. Run `devbox run setup-types` first.'; exit 1; fi
echo 'Created tsconfig.json for local editor support. It is gitignored so it will not affect CloudPebble builds.'
